subject: Question about my repayment schedule
body: Hello, I recently received approval for a working capital loan of PLN 850,000. I would like to understand my repayment schedule in more detail. Specifically, I want to know the exact monthly instalment amount, the total interest I will pay over the 36-month term, and whether I can make early repayments without any penalty. Could you please send me a full amortisation table? Thank you, Marek Kowalski

subject: URGENT — payment was taken twice from my account!!!
body: This is absolutely unacceptable. Your system has taken two payments from my account this month — one on the 1st and another on the 8th of November. I have been charged PLN 12,400 twice and my account is now overdrawn. I need this resolved IMMEDIATELY and the duplicate payment refunded today. If this is not fixed by end of day I will be contacting my lawyer and the financial regulator. Anna Nowak, CEO BuildPro

subject: How do I apply for a top-up loan?
body: Hi, I have an existing loan with FinServe that I have been repaying for 18 months without any issues. I am now looking to expand my business and would like to apply for an additional loan on top of my existing facility. Could you explain the process for applying for a top-up or a second loan? What documents will I need and how long does the approval process usually take? Thanks, Piotr

subject: Cannot log in to the client portal
body: Hello, I have been trying to log in to the FinServe client portal since yesterday but keep getting an error message saying my account is locked. I need to access my loan statements urgently for an audit that is happening tomorrow morning. I have already tried resetting my password twice but the problem persists. Please help as soon as possible. Katarzyna Zielinska, Finance Director

subject: Request to restructure my loan due to financial difficulties
body: Dear FinServe team, I am writing to inform you that our company has been experiencing serious cash flow difficulties over the past three months due to the loss of a major contract. We are currently unable to meet our monthly repayment obligation of PLN 18,500. I would like to formally request a loan restructuring — either a temporary payment holiday of 3 months or a reduction in monthly instalments. I hope we can find a solution together. Tomasz Grabowski, Director
